name: Rapport Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Rapport Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to the discovery and development of small molecule precision medicines for patients with neurological or psychiatric disorders. Its lead product candidate, RAP-219, is an AMPA receptor negative allosteric modulator designed to achieve neuroanatomical specificity by targeting TARP γ8, and is being evaluated for focal onset seizures, primary generalized tonic-clonic seizures, and bipolar mania. The company also has advanced discovery-stage programs targeting nicotinic acetylcholine receptors for chronic pain and hearing disorders.
sellsTo: patients with neurological or psychiatric disorders
patients with drug-resistant focal onset seizures

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to the discovery and development of small molecule precision medicines for patients with neurological or psychiatric disorders.

catalysts.event: Present 8-week follow-up results from Phase 2a proof-of-concept trial of RAP-219 in FOS
catalysts.sentence: We expect to present 8-week follow-up results in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Data from open-label long term safety trial of RAP-219 in FOS
catalysts.sentence: Data from the open-label trial are expected in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 program of RAP-219 in drug-resistant FOS
catalysts.sentence: expect to initiate the Phase 3 program in FOS in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 3 trial of RAP-219 in primary generalized tonic-clonic seizures
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 3 trial in PGTCS in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Topline results from Phase 2 proof-of-concept trial of RAP-219 in bipolar mania
catalysts.sentence: Our Phase 2 proof-of-concept trial in bipolar mania is currently enrolling patients, with topline results expected in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initial pharmacokinetics results from LAI formulation of RAP-219
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated IND-enabling activities to support a Phase 1 clinical study in healthy volunteers, with initial pharmacokinetics (PK) results expected in 2027.
